name: post2all
description: Connect Codex to Post2All for listing accounts and creating, scheduling, updating, or managing social posts through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Manage social posts through Post2All MCP.
interface.longDescription: Post2All connects Codex to the hosted Post2All MCP server so agents can list connected social accounts and create, schedule, update, cancel, or delete social posts through OAuth.
defaultPrompt: Draft a social post in Post2All.
